title: Generate SAS program to create SDTM RELREC (Related Records) domain

inputs.prompt: Write a SAS program to create the SDTM RELREC (Related Records) domain dataset. The program must: (1) Read raw related records data, (2) Derive USUBJID and RELRECSEQ (sequential numbering per subject), (3) Map key variables: RDOMAIN, USUBJID, IDVAR, IDVARVAL, RELTYPE, RELID, (4) Handle inter-domain relationship identification, RELID assignment, IDVAR mapping, (5) Apply variable attributes per SDTM specification, (6) Create a permanent SAS dataset with xport format. The dataset contains approximately 38 records.
